input.oldString:
<Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                onClick={() => {
                  console.log('Disconnect button clicked')
                  disconnect()
                  toast.success('Wallet disconnected')
                }}
                className="h-7 text-xs px-2"
              >
                {address?.slice(0, 6)}...{address?.slice(-4)}
              </Button>
input.newString:
<Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                onClick={() => {
                  console.log('Disconnect button clicked, isConnected:', isConnected)
                  disconnect()
                  setTimeout(() => {
                    if (isConnected) {
                      console.log('Still connected after disconnect attempt')
                    } else {
                      toast.success('Wallet disconnected')
                    }
                  }, 100)
                }}
                className="h-7 text-xs px-2"
              >
                {address?.slice(0, 6)}...{address?.slice(-4)}
              </Button>
